name: personal-note-maker
description: A simple and efficient web application to manage your daily tasks and thoughts. Users can easily create, view, edit, and delete notes.  Features:  Create Notes: Quick entry for new ideas or tasks. Edit Notes: Update existing content on the fly. Delete Notes: Remove completed or unwanted notes. Responsive Design: Fully functional on mobile and desktop devices. Persistent Storage: (Optional: Mention if you use LocalStorage, MongoDB, etc.)

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
